results.rendered_html:
bhraṃśin (wie eben) adj.
1〉 entfallend, herausfallend, abfallend: taṭaruhatarubhraṃśibhiḥ [Page5-0398] śīrṇaparṇaiḥ  MEGH. 30 . darbhairardhāvalīḍhaiḥ śramavivṛtamukhabhraṃśibhiḥ  ŚĀK. 7 . idaṃ tāvadasulabhasthānabhraṃśi (aṅgulīyaṃ) śocanīyam 83,23 . stürzend, zu Fall kommend: niṣkrayabhraṃsin (guru)  MĀRK. P. 15,37 . kāṅkṣannabhraṃśinīṃ śriyam dauerndes Glück  Spr. 3175 .
— 2〉 zu Fall bringend, zu Nichte machend: svārtha˚  PAÑCAT. 248,18 .

results.rendered_html:
bhraṃśin a. [bhraṃa-nini]
1 Falling off or down, falling from.
2 Decaying.
3 Straying away from.
4 Ruining, destroying.
